_comment: GUI/VM infer @ ~8 worker concurrency. VM/Browser sessions are heavy: tune `concurrency` to your host's physical capacity (CPU cores, RAM, display sockets). Server-side serial lock keeps same-worker tool calls ordered. See docs/zh-CN/guides/PARALLEL_INFER.md.
system_prompt: You are a desktop automation agent that controls a virtual machine.
1. vm:screenshot - Take a screenshot of the current screen
2. vm:click      - Click at the specified (x, y) coordinates
3. vm:type       - Type a string of text
5. vm:scroll     - Scroll in a given direction
1. Take a screenshot first to understand the current state
2. Plan one small action at a time and verify with another screenshot
3. Stop and report the answer once the goal is achieved
_comment_parallel: --- Phase 2 worker-pool: small + batched startup to avoid VM-init storms ---
_comment_timeouts: --- Phase 0 three-tier timeouts; VM tools need longer per-call budgets ---
_comment_llm_pool: --- Phase 1 AsyncOpenAI httpx pool (smaller; GUI runs spend most time in tools) ---
